text.p: Complaining About The Poor Road in The State. I am aprecial of your recent elect-ion as the Chairman of local government area. I wish to complain about the poor road in the State.

I would like to request for your help in the area in other to enable the farmers to improve they income by transport the Agriculture production. without a good road, a vehicle would not be able to go through some areas.

I also like to inform you that, please Mr. Chairman we need your help to avoid accident in the area, purpose the poor road. Some of the roads in our locality are digg by the erosion which cause accident in our locality. Please Mr. Chairmant I need your help to fill the erosion.
I hope you will solve the problem by using your power . purpose to avoid the Consequences in the state.
